candidates.why: Separate operating D&A component, but not identified as relating to Cost of Sales; with COGS already selected as the subtotal 'Cost of Sales', there is no explicit COGS-specific D&A line to add separately.
Separate operating D&A component, but not labeled as COGS/cost of sales; adding to the selected 'Cost of Sales' bucket would risk misclassification/double counting.
Presented as a separate operating D&A line at the same level as other operating expenses, not specifically tied to Cost of Sales.
A small balancing line within the operating D&A section, but not specifically attributable to Cost of Sales.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Operating depreciation component, but not labeled as belonging to Cost of Sales; no explicit evidence it sits outside/alongside the selected COGS bucket specifically.

variables.notes: No explicit D&A row is identified as belonging to COGS/cost of sales. The selected COGS reference bucket is the subtotal 'Cost of Sales', and the visible D&A rows appear as separate operating expense lines at a broader operating level rather than as COGS-specific add-backs. Conservative choice to avoid double counting is no separate COGS_DA row.

candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A component shown separately from the selected XSGA bucket rows ('Personnel Expenses' and 'Other Operating Expenses'). Since earlier mapping explicitly excluded depreciation/amortization from XSGA components, this should be added separately.

Explicit operating amortization line presented separately from the selected XSGA component rows. No separate R&D expense row is selected, so this should be included in XSGA_DA rather than treated as XRD-related.
Explicit operating depreciation line at the same level as the selected overhead buckets, indicating it sits outside the chosen XSGA rows and should be added separately.
Part of the operating D&A section and needed to capture the full separate D&A amount when using component lines instead of the impairment-inclusive summary.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Operating depreciation component listed separately in the D&A section. Because the selected XSGA bucket excludes depreciation/amortization, this separate depreciation line should be added to XSGA_DA.
This is a higher-level summary, but it includes impairment, which must be ignored for this task. Therefore it should not be selected even though it summarizes the D&A section.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets

variables.notes: The selected XSGA reference bucket is only 'Personnel Expenses' plus 'Other Operating Expenses'. Separate operating D&A lines are visible above operating profit and were explicitly excluded from the earlier XSGA_COMPONENTS mapping, so they should be added separately here. The summary row 'Depreciation/Amortization and Impairment' is not used because it includes impairment; therefore the component D&A rows are selected instead.
